readings.Aries: The shortcut exists. It will cost you something you didn't account for. Worth knowing now. What worked before will not work the same way this time.
readings.Taurus: The loyalty you extend to others is real. It occasionally extends past the point of useful. Sleep on it before committing.
readings.Gemini: The duality you experience is not a disorder — it's wide bandwidth. Channel it deliberately. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Cancer: You've been carrying this longer than is reasonable. Set it down. Someone can help you. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Leo: Your instinct to lead is correct. Your instinct to control the entire outcome needs recalibrating. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Virgo: The system you've built is working. You are allowed to stop improving it for one day. One conversation today matters more than the rest combined.
readings.Libra: The harmony you've created has required you to disappear into it. Reappear. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Scorpio: You know something about someone that they don't know you know. Decide what to do with it carefully. Act from the calmest part of yourself.
readings.Sagittarius: The freedom you're seeking is available now, in this constraint. Find it. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Capricorn: Something you've dismissed as not yet achievable is closer than the plan shows. Let this one be easy.
readings.Aquarius: Something you're doing for the collective has drifted away from the reason you started. Reconnect with the reason. The window for this is shorter than it looks.
readings.Pisces: The feeling you can't name is trying to tell you something that language hasn't caught up to yet. Act from the calmest part of yourself.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You accelerate each other. The direction you're heading is worth establishing before you reach full speed.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
